task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Implement product recommendation engine' work package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work package details view for 'Implement product recommendation engine' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Open the Relations tab for the work package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Relations' tab is selected or the relations section is visible in the work package details view.

task_completion.description: Create a 'follows' relation to 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A relation is displayed showing 'follows' (or similar dependency indicator) pointing to the work package 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch'.

task_completion.description: Set a lag of 2 days for the relation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The relation shows a lag value of '2' or '2 days' next to the 'follows' dependency.

task_completion.description: Add the required comment explaining the dependency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A comment containing the phrases 'Elasticsearch', 'stabilized', and 'search index' is visible in the activity or comments section of the 'Implement product recommendation engine' work package.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with OpenProject.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser interface navigating the OpenProject application.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing curl commands, rails console, or database queries.

integrity.description: The comment was entered into the actual OpenProject comment box.
integrity.visual_evidence: The comment is seen typed into the OpenProject text editor or displayed as a submitted comment in the work package activity stream, not just in a notepad or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source Work Package: 'Implement product recommendation engine'. Target Work Package: 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch'. Expected Relation Type: 'follows'. Expected Lag: 2 days. Required Comment Phrases: 'Elasticsearch', 'stabilized', and 'search index'.
